homePage.heroDescription: Explore new recipes, follow your favorite cooks, and share your own creations. From quick everyday meals to something a bit more special, find ideas that inspire you.

authModal.genericError: Sign in failed. Please try again.

authModal.googleTokenError: Google did not return a sign-in token.
authModal.googleMissingClientId: Google client ID is not configured.

changePasswordModal.title: Change your password
changePasswordModal.sameAsCurrent: Your new password must be different from the current one.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Transcendence ("we", "us") operates this platform for sharing and discovering recipes. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacyPage.collectAccount: Account information: When you register, we collect your username, email address, and password.
privacyPage.collectUsage: Usage data: We collect information about how you use the platform, such as recipes you view, create, or save.
privacyPage.collectCookies: Cookies: We use cookies to maintain your session and language preferences.
privacyPage.useProvide: To provide and improve our services.
privacyPage.useAuth: To authenticate you and maintain your session.
privacyPage.usePrefs: To remember your preferences such as language.
privacyPage.shareText: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with service providers who assist in operating this platform, under strict confidentiality obligations.
privacyPage.securityText: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure.
privacyPage.rightsText: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us.
privacyPage.cookiesText: We use session and preference cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some features may not work correctly.
privacyPage.contactText: For privacy-related questions, contact us at msavelie@student.hive.fi.

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.intro: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using Transcendence. By accessing or using the platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
termsPage.acceptanceText: By creating an account or using this platform, you confirm that you are at least 13 years old and agree to these Terms and Conditions.
termsPage.useText: You may use Transcendence to discover, create, and share recipes for personal, non-commercial purposes. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
termsPage.contentText: You retain ownership of the content you post. By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and distribute it within the platform. You are responsible for ensuring your content does not violate any laws or third-party rights.
termsPage.prohibited1: Posting harmful, offensive, or illegal content.
termsPage.prohibited2: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to other accounts or systems.
termsPage.prohibited3: Using automated tools to scrape or extract content without permission.
termsPage.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or engage in behavior that harms the platform or other users.
termsPage.liabilityText: The platform is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
termsPage.changesText: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
termsPage.contactText: If you have any questions about these terms, contact us at msavelie@student.hive.fi.

recipeCreatePage.title: Add a Recipe
recipeCreatePage.subtitle: Know the recipe that is worth to be famous? Share it with us <3
recipeCreatePage.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your recipe in a way that makes mouths water.
recipeCreatePage.networkError: Could not reach the server. Please try again.

recipeCreateValidation.descriptionMax: Description must be at most {{count}} characters
recipeCreateValidation.servingsInt: Servings must be a whole number
recipeCreateValidation.servingsPositive: Servings must be a positive integer
recipeCreateValidation.spicinessInt: Spiciness must be a whole number
recipeCreateValidation.hoursInt: Hours must be a whole number
recipeCreateValidation.minutesInt: Minutes must be a whole number
recipeCreateValidation.ingredientsMin: At least one ingredient is required
recipeCreateValidation.instructionsMin: At least one instruction step is required
recipeCreateValidation.prepTimeNonneg: Prep time must be 0 or more
recipeCreateValidation.cookTimePositive: Cook time must be greater than 0
